title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
slides: OKX bets AI agents will hire other AI agents.
The exchange now lets agents generate crypto wallets autonomously.
But these wallets can pay each other—without human approval.
You can deploy agents that negotiate their own service fees.
Test one agent hiring another by tomorrow on OKX.
thread_text:
They pay each other.

OKX lets AI agents generate crypto wallets and send funds autonomously — no human approval needed.

Your agent hires.

Deploy agents that negotiate their own service fees and hire other agents to complete tasks.

Wallets without owners.

These wallets are created by agents, not humans, and can transact entirely on their own.

Fees are negotiated.

Agents set terms with each other, agreeing on payment for services without a human in the loop.

Test it tomorrow.

Go to OKX and launch an agent that hires another agent. Can you simulate a micro-economy in 24 hours?
video_script: AI agents create wallets without humans.

script: AI agents create wallets without humans.

instagram.caption:
AI agents on OKX can now generate their own crypto wallets and pay each other — without a human saying yes.

The exchange lets agents negotiate their own service fees and hire other agents to complete tasks. These wallets have no human owner. Agents transact entirely on their own.

If you build or use AI tools, you can now deploy an agent that hires another agent autonomously tomorrow.

Can you get two agents to strike a deal in 24 hours? 🧠

carousel_slides.description: OKX lets autonomous agents generate wallets and transact without human approval.
Deploy agents that negotiate fees and hire other agents to complete tasks autonomously.
Crypto wallets created by agents, not humans, transacting entirely on their own.
Agents negotiate payment terms with each other, no human in the loop needed.
Launch an agent that hires another agent and build your micro-economy in 24 hours.
